violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by miscellaneous items. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. FMC expired, must re-instate. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
